                 +-------------------[  Outer  ]+
                 |   +-----------[  Inner  ]+   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   |   +----[  Deep  ]+   |   |
                 |   |   |              |   |   |
                 |   |   |              |   |   |
+-------+        |   |   |  +--------+  |   |   |  +------+
|  Out  |<------------------+  Node  |<------------+  In  |
+-------+        |   |   |  +--------+  |   |   |  +------+
                 |   |   |              |   |   |
                 |   |   |              |   |   |
                 |   |   +--------------+   |   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   +----------------------+   |
                 |                              |
                 |                              |
                 |                              |
                 |                              |
                 |                              |
                 |                              |
                 +------------------------------+
